sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90563" key="pro/troxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρότροχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">τροχός</etym>) <sense id="n90563.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fore-wheel</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:34:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
